name: Scottish Regional Safe Havens
description: A network of regional safe havens across Scotland providing secure access to local and regional health data for research. These operate separately from the national routes (Research Data Scotland and eDRIS) and can offer access to local clinical datasets, potentially with faster turnaround for regional studies. Regional safe havens include those based at NHS boards and academic health science centres.
population_coverage: Regional Scottish populations (varies by safe haven)
tre_platform: Regional safe haven environments (varies by location)

requirements.name: PBPP approval
requirements.description: Public Benefit and Privacy Panel approval required for access to Scottish health data

requirements.name: Local governance approval
requirements.description: Additional local governance arrangements may apply depending on the specific regional safe haven

access_steps.name: Contact regional safe haven
access_steps.description: Identify and contact the appropriate regional safe haven for the study area and data requirements

access_steps.name: Submit governance applications
access_steps.description: Apply for PBPP approval and any local governance requirements specific to the regional safe haven

access_steps.name: Governance review
access_steps.description: PBPP and local governance review of the application

access_steps.name: Data provisioning
access_steps.description: Data prepared and workspace provisioned within the regional safe haven

timeline.notes: Engagement with regional safe haven and application preparation
Data preparation and safe haven workspace setup

costs.notes: Costs vary by regional safe haven. Many are free for approved academic research but arrangements differ across regions.

strengths: May be faster than national routes for regional studies
Access to local clinical data not available through national platforms
Closer working relationship with local clinical teams and NHS boards
Can support studies focused on specific geographic areas
limitations: Regional scope - data limited to specific geographic areas
Varying capabilities, data holdings, and maturity across different safe havens
Less standardised processes compared to national routes (RDS, eDRIS)
May still require PBPP approval adding to timeline
recent_changes: Increasing alignment with national Safe Haven standards
Growing integration with Research Data Scotland coordination framework
